candidates.title: Sample Senior React Engineer
candidates.description: Senior React and TypeScript engineer role building patient workflow tools for healthcare operations teams. The role focuses on accessible interfaces, reliable state management, and product collaboration.
candidates.verificationNote: Pipeline test candidate with a verified-style company website field.

candidates.title: Sample Full Stack Product Engineer

candidates.verificationNote: Pipeline test candidate with publisher-company coverage.
